summary: Iteration 21: Complete testing of 3 major feature implementations - 1) Animated background with glassmorphism on Login/Register pages, 2) Messaging system between Admin and Organizers, 3) Clickable stat cards on dashboards. ALL FEATURES WORKING CORRECTLY.
passed_tests: Login page: Animated dark background (bg-[#050a14]) with glassmorphism card displayed correctly
Login page: Logo, email input, password input, submit button all present with proper data-testid attributes
Login page: Link to register page works correctly
Register page: Animated background with glassmorphism card displayed correctly
Register page: All fields present (name, email, phone, password, confirm password) with data-testid attributes
Register page: Link to login page works correctly
Login functionality: admin@sportsconnect.fr/admin123 successfully logs in and redirects to /admin
Admin Dashboard: 4 tabs present (Vue d'ensemble, Utilisateurs, Paiements, Messages)
Admin Dashboard: Stat cards are clickable - clicking 'Utilisateurs' card switches to users tab
Admin Dashboard: Stat cards are clickable - clicking 'Net Plateforme' switches to payments tab
Admin Dashboard: Messages tab displays MessagingPage component
Admin Dashboard: Conversations sidebar visible with existing conversation (Club Sportif Paris)
Admin Dashboard: New conversation button opens panel with organizer list
Organizer Dashboard: 4 clickable stat cards with chevron arrows present
Organizer Dashboard: OrganizerNav includes 'Messages' link
Organizer Dashboard: Clicking Messages navigates to /messages route
Organizer Dashboard: MessagingPage shows conversations with admin
Messaging API: GET /api/conversations returns conversations for authenticated user (11/11 tests passed)
Messaging API: POST /api/conversations creates new conversation between two users
Messaging API: POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages sends messages
Messaging API: GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages returns messages and marks as read
Messaging API: GET /api/conversations/unread-count returns correct unread count
Messaging API: GET /api/admin/organizers returns list of organizers for admin
Messaging API: GET /api/messaging/admins returns list of admins for organizer
Messaging API: Unauthorized access blocked (401)
Messaging API: Non-participant cannot access conversation (403)
seed_data_creation: Test conversations and messages created during API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21: All 3 major features tested and working. Login/Register have animated backgrounds (same as Coming Soon page) with glassmorphism cards. Admin and Organizer dashboards have clickable stat cards with chevron icons. Messaging system fully functional with conversations, messages, read status. Admin can message organizers, organizers can message admins. Preview access: ?preview=SPORTLYO2026.
